
# Information, Complexity, and Self-Organization

## Chapter Purpose

Explore emergence, entropy, systems theory, cybernetics, information theory, self-organization, and complexity as bridges between life and consciousness.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
